name: @passage/design-system
description: Passage's real UI building blocks — the "Press" direction (warm paper, letterpress ink, burgundy accent) — as importable React components. Mirrors static/passage.css and theme.py 1:1; not a reimplementation.

scripts.build: tsup src/index.ts --format esm,cjs --dts --sourcemap && cp src/styles.css dist/styles.css
